title: wiRedPanda MCP (Model Context Protocol) Schema
description: JSON Schema for wiRedPanda Model Context Protocol commands and responses

ElementType.description: Valid element types for circuit creation

ImageExportFormat.description: Valid export formats for circuit images

WaveformExportFormat.description: Valid export formats for waveform data and charts

connect_elements.description: Connect two circuit elements via their ports. Ports can be specified by index (source_port/target_port) or by label (source_port_label/target_port_label). At least one of each pair must be provided.

source_port.description: Output port index on source element (0-based)

source_port_label.description: Output port label on source element (alternative to source_port)

target_port.description: Input port index on target element (0-based)

target_port_label.description: Input port label on target element (alternative to target_port)

list_connections.description: List all connections in the current circuit

split_connection.description: Split a connection by inserting a node element

list_elements.description: List all elements in the current circuit

undo.description: Execute undo operation on current circuit

redo.description: Execute redo operation on current circuit

set_input_value.description: Set the value of an input element

get_output_value.description: Get the current value of an element's output

get_server_info.description: Get server information, version, and capabilities

load_circuit.description: Load a circuit from a .panda file

save_circuit.description: Save the current circuit to a .panda file

close_circuit.description: Close the current circuit tab without saving

get_tab_count.description: Get the number of open circuit tabs

create_waveform.description: Create waveform analysis for the current circuit

input_patterns.description: Input patterns for specific input elements

additionalProperties.description: Array of 0/1 values for this input signal

export_waveform.description: Export waveform data to file (TXT or PNG format)

filename.description: Output filename for the waveform export

format.description: Export format: 'txt' for text data or 'png' for image

create_ic.description: Create an Integrated Circuit (IC) from current circuit

instantiate_ic.description: Create an instance of a previously created IC

blob_name.description: Custom blob name for inline mode (defaults to ic_name)

list_ics.description: List all available ICs in the current directory

embed_ic.description: Convert a file-backed IC to an embedded IC

element_id.description: Element ID of the file-backed IC to embed

blob_name.description: Optional blob name override (defaults to file basename)

extract_ic.description: Extract an embedded IC to a .panda file

blob_name.description: Blob name of the embedded IC to extract

move_element.description: Move an element to a new position

set_element_properties.description: Set various properties of an element

appearance.description: Appearance path or 'default' for elements that support custom appearances

appearance_index.description: State index for multi-state element appearances

rotate_element.description: Rotate an element by specified degrees

flip_element.description: Flip an element horizontally or vertically

delay.description: Phase delay as fraction of period (Clock elements)

audio.description: Audio file path (AudioBox) or note name (Buzzer)

locked.description: Lock input element to prevent user interaction

appearance.description: Custom appearance image path (empty string restores default)

appearance_index.description: Appearance slot index for multi-state elements (e.g. LED states). Use with 'appearance' parameter.

change_input_size.description: Change the number of input ports on an element

change_output_size.description: Change the number of output ports on an element

toggle_truth_table_output.description: Toggle an output in a truth table element

morph_element.description: Morph one or more elements to a different element type

element_ids.description: List of element IDs to morph

target_type.description: Target element type to morph to

get_effective_theme.description: Get the effective application theme (system resolves to light or dark)

effective_theme.description: Resolved theme; 'system' always maps to 'light' or 'dark'
